prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-REVIVEXDOWNCLEANER-PARENT Product Type: CLEANING_AGENT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Revivex Down Cleaner Wash and Care Kits for Down Puffer Jackets and Sleeping Bags, Restores Loft, Repairs Holes with Tenacious Tape Description: Use ReviveX Down Cleaner by Gear Aid and you can clean your favorite down like a pro without the expensive bill.

This gentle formula preserves natural oils to restore the loft and warmth you thought was gone forever. Perfect for all down, including DownTek and other water repellent down products, just one wash per season will keep your down lofty and warm. It will also gently clean waterproof breathable shell fabrics, making it a necessary step before treating with ReviveX Durable Waterproofing. Part of the family of brands, Gear Aid features trusted repair and maintenance products for outdoor gear. For over three decades has been providing you with the Essentials for Adventure. Search Terms: down cleaner jacket for clothes washer revivex sleeping bag rain and concentrate comforter coat Features: - 4x concentrated formula cleans up to 24 garments - High-performance down Cleaner preserves the natural oils, loft and warmth of down - Ideal for Use on all down, including downtek and other treated down - Gentle formula will not damage down insulation - Safe for Use on all down products === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Revivex Down Cleaner for Jackets and Bags

tokens.name: Revivex Down Cleaner for Jackets and Bags

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4X Concentrated Formula, Preserves Loft And Warmth, Safe For All Down Types, Cleans Up To 24 Garments

openai.title_differentiation: 4X Concentrated, Cleans Up To 24 Garments, Preserves Loft And Warmth, Safe On DownTek, Gentle On Shell Fabrics
